title: BTC breaks 50k resistance
content: Bitcoin has broken the 50k resistance level after weeks of consolidation. Analysts predict further upside.

title: ETH upgrade announcement
content: Ethereum announces a Q2 upgrade. Gas fees are expected to decrease significantly.

title: Market analysis report
content: Analysts predict bullish trend for Bitcoin and altcoins. Interest rate decisions may impact crypto liquidity.
Asian markets show positive sentiment. BTC trading volume surges in Korea.

title: Fed speakers discuss liquidity
content: Federal Reserve speakers said liquidity remains ample while investors debate interest rate timing.
